missions.title: Open /jarvis locally and verify panels
missions.safe_next_prompt: Run the local server, open /jarvis, and report whether all panels render correctly. Do not modify files.

missions.title: Generate cached health report manually
missions.safe_next_prompt: Run python tools/jarvis_health_report.py from the repo root and confirm storage/jarvis/health_report.json shows overall pass. Do not modify app code.
missions.notes: Refreshes the read-only Health Report panel. Offline only.

missions.title: Add cached route smoke report later
missions.safe_next_prompt: Design a read-only cached route smoke report that records HTTP status for key GET routes, written offline and only read by /api/jarvis/status. Do not add execution controls.
missions.notes: Future additive, read-only step. Not started.

missions.title: Add read-only trading bridge detail panel later
missions.safe_next_prompt: Extend the JARVIS trading bridge panel with additional read-only sealed-lifecycle detail. Keep trading execution LOCKED and add no order path.
missions.notes: Read-only viewer enhancement only. No broker, no orders.

missions.title: Add read-only Claude/Codex prompt library later
missions.safe_next_prompt: Add a read-only panel that displays a curated set of safe operator prompts from a tracked JSON file. Display text only, no execution.
missions.notes: Display-only library. No prompt is ever executed by the web app.

missions.title: Review untracked-file hygiene later
missions.safe_next_prompt: Review the large set of untracked files under data/, tools/, and docs/ and propose a .gitignore / cleanup plan. Report only; do not delete or stage anything without approval.
missions.notes: Hygiene review. No deletion without explicit approval.
